title: potentilla × italica
intro: Potentilla × italica, also known as Italian cinquefoil, is a hybrid flowering plant that combines the characteristics of Potentilla reptans and Potentilla silenifolia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Potentilla × italica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine.
